name: Sweet and Sour Cucumber Salad
recipeIngredient: Black pepper and salt to taste
recipeInstructions:
1 Slice the cucumbers into thin 1/8 inch slices and arrange them neatly around a serving plate.
2 Mix the sweet wine or honey, the vinegar, liquamen, pennyroyal (or mint), and asafetida (optional) and pour over the cucumber slices.
3 Season with salt and pepper to taste. Serve.
